description: The PointClusterMesh component generates a randomized cluster of points in a cloud. These points can be displayed via a Mesh Renderer using a Unlit Material with at least it's ``UseBillboardGeometry`` field set to true.

fields.Seed: The number to use to seed the generation of random points.
fields.Points: The number of points to generate.
fields.Scale: The scale of the generated mesh.
fields.JitterRange: The maximum value to randomly offset each point.
fields.UniformSize: Whether all points should always be uniformly scaled.
fields.MinSize: The minimum size of a point.
fields.MaxSize: The maximum size of a point.
fields.MinRotation: The minimum rotation of a point.
fields.MaxRotation: The maximum rotation of a point.

usage: This is used for the colored orbs in the sky of the Resonite Cloud Home.
